title: Clean vehicle underbody
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Clean vehicle underbody demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to clean vehicle underbody

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Manufacturer recommended cleaning methods, workplace procedures, and cleaning material safety data sheets (SDS) are sourced and interpreted1.3 Cleaning materials are selected, inspected for quality and suitability, and required quantities are calculated1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Tools and equipment, including personal protective equipment (PPE), are selected and checked for serviceability1.6 Work is planned to identify cleaning methods, minimise waste, and prevent damage to vehicle
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Manufacturer recommended cleaning methods, workplace procedures, and cleaning material safety data sheets (SDS) are sourced and interpreted1.3 Cleaning materials are selected, inspected for quality and suitability, and required quantities are calculated1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Tools and equipment, including personal protective equipment (PPE), are selected and checked for serviceability1.6 Work is planned to identify cleaning methods, minimise waste, and prevent damage to vehicle?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Manufacturer recommended cleaning methods, workplace procedures, and cleaning material safety data sheets (SDS) are sourced and interpreted1.3 Cleaning materials are selected, inspected for quality and suitability, and required quantities are calculated1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Tools and equipment, including personal protective equipment (PPE), are selected and checked for serviceability1.6 Work is planned to identify cleaning methods, minimise waste, and prevent damage to vehicle.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to clean vehicle underbody

elements.title: Wash and clean vehicle underbody

pcs.text: Cleaning tools, equipment and underbody component protective products are used according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Vehicle underbody and components are washed and cleaned according to manufacturer recommended methods, and without causing damage to vehicle’s electrical or mechanical components or systems2.3 Washing and cleaning are completed according to customer requirements, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Cleaning tools, equipment and underbody component protective products are used according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Vehicle underbody and components are washed and cleaned according to manufacturer recommended methods, and without causing damage to vehicle’s electrical or mechanical components or systems2.3 Washing and cleaning are completed according to customer requirements, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements?

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Wash and clean vehicle underbody

elements.title: Dry vehicle underbody components

pcs.text: Drying processes and equipment are selected and used according to workplace procedures and customer requirements3.2 Vehicle underbody and components are dried according to workplace procedures, manufacturer recommended methods and customer requirements, and without causing damage to system or components3.3 Vehicle unit and system components are inspected and tested to ensure normal operation after the washing and drying process
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Drying processes and equipment are selected and used according to workplace procedures and customer requirements3.2 Vehicle underbody and components are dried according to workplace procedures, manufacturer recommended methods and customer requirements, and without causing damage to system or components3.3 Vehicle unit and system components are inspected and tested to ensure normal operation after the washing and drying process?

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Dry vehicle underbody components

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Final inspection is made to ensure work meets workplace expectations and vehicle is presented ready for use4.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected and stored4.3 Tools and equipment are checked, reported if faulty, and stored according to workplace procedures4.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures
